metadata.description: {\rtf1\ansi\fs24{\fs48\b MC Scripts\b}\line\line Unified ReaPack repository for REAPER scripts developed by MC Scripts.\line\line Import this ReaPack repository:\line\line \i\ul text https://github.com/Echo722/MC-Scripts/raw/main/index.xml \ul0\i0 \line\line Scripts install under:\line\line \i\ul text REAPER/Scripts/MC Scripts Release/<script-folder>/ \ul0\i0 \line\line {\fs24\b Packages\b}\line\line {\par \bullet\tab MCAssistant: in-REAPER AI chat assistant with streaming and batch-operation tools.\line \bullet\tab MediaEye: Media Explorer album art viewer for embedded and sidecar cover images.\line }\line {\fs24\b Release Convention\b}\line\line Packages in this repository use:\line\line {\par \bullet\tab Author: \i\ul MC Scripts\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Repository name: \i\ul MC Scripts Release\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Category: \i\ul <script-folder>\ul0\i0 \line \bullet\tab Source file paths: direct package files such as \i\ul MediaEye.lua\ul0\i0 or \i\ul MCAssistant.lua\ul0\i0 \line }\line }

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Move installed files under MC Scripts Release/MCAssistant so ReaPack installs into the MC Scripts Release folder.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Rename provider type 'claude' to 'anthropic' so both providers use vendor names (anthropic / openai). 'claude' is kept as a silent alias so existing 0.5.1 configs still load.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Settings overlay with visual web search toggle. Click gear icon to open Settings panel with toggle pill for web search, API key management, and provider config. Replaces text-field toggle (1/0) with click-to-toggle UI. Bug fix: local ui declaration order for callback closures. pcall protection for overlay rendering.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: ReaImGui port — native Chinese / Unicode input, no more Ctrl+E modal. Full UI rewrite from gfx to ReaImGui: InputTextMultiline handles IME directly, user messages render as terracotta bubbles, settings popup is an inline editable modal (Provider radio + Base URL / Model / API key / Search key with show/hide toggle), modal dim overlay disabled so main UI isn't greyed when settings opens. Status bar shows just the model name. ✱ thinking spinner pulses, role gaps between turns, ↓ jump-to-latest button when scrolled up. ReaImGui is now a hard dependency (install via ReaPack). chat / provider / http / tools / json unchanged.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Chat text is selectable + copyable. Drag-select + Ctrl+C now works on user bubbles, AI responses, tool input/output rows, and error messages — ReadOnly InputTextMultiline replaces Text/TextWrapped. Word wrap is done manually (binary search on byte position, utf-8-safe so CJK glyphs don't split) and cached per event so frozen messages don't re-measure each frame. The ✱ thinking spinner placeholder stays non-selectable. Status-bar hint reads '拖选可复制' instead of 'Ctrl+W 关闭'. ui.lua only — chat / provider / http / tools / json untouched.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Image input for AI vision workflows: paste clipboard images, drag PNG/JPG/GIF/WebP files onto the chat window, or attach files from the picker. Adds pending/image-history thumbnails, 5 MB image validation, model vision warnings, friendlier image API error hints, and new base64.lua/image.lua support modules. chat.lua now carries optional attachments and provider.lua translates image blocks for OpenAI-compatible endpoints.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Settings panel restyle (segmented provider toggle, grouped cards, outline/filled buttons) plus two chat-window stability fixes. Crash fix 1: clicking the window during AI generation no longer triggers a Windows TDR/BSOD on affected GPU drivers — the dangerous InputTextMultiline + CallbackAlways + ReadOnly combo is no longer rendered in the busy branch (DrawList_AddText + Dummy preserve the visual slot). Crash fix 2: the EEL InputText capture callback is now ImGui_Attach'd to the ctx at creation, matching how fonts and images are owned; previously ReaImGui could GC it under streaming string pressure and the next InputTextMultiline call would dereference a stale pointer.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Fix: the sent message no longer reappears in the input box after the AI finishes replying. Clearing the input now bumps the InputText's ImGui ID (forcing ReaImGui to drop its cached buffer) and wipes the EEL capture slot (#LastBuf), which went stale while the widget was unrendered during generation and was read back on the first idle frame. The input also re-focuses itself after a send so you can keep typing without clicking back in. ui.lua only.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Startup update check. On launch MCAssistant asynchronously fetches the MC-Scripts ReaPack index and, if a newer version is published, shows a confirm dialog: 现在更新 opens the ReaPack browser filtered to MCAssistant, 以后再说 remembers that version so it won't nag again until an even newer one ships. The check is non-blocking and fails silently. Fetch falls back across mirrors (raw.githubusercontent then jsDelivr CDN) so it works whether or not REAPER's curl has a proxy. New module: update.lua.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Fix: the noticeable load delay introduced in 0.8.5 is gone, and the update prompt now persists across launches. The startup update check is throttled to once per 24h via ExtState (last_update_check_at) — most reloads no longer spawn curl, so the window appears instantly. The update notification now persists: the last-known latest version is cached (last_known_latest_version), so if you click "以后再说" the popup will come back on the next launch and keep nagging until you actually update. Previously "以后再说" silenced the prompt until an even newer version shipped. MCAssistant.lua only.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Controlled autonomous REAPER Lua execution, with safety hardening. New reaper_lua_execute tool: when the dedicated tools can't express a task, the assistant runs a short generated Lua snippet against REAPER's API. The environment is heavily restricted — no io/os/package/require/debug/coroutine, no pcall/load, no while/repeat/goto, no external-process APIs, no background defer loops, no JS_*/BR_Win32_*/SNM_* APIs, no action system (Main_OnCommand/MIDIEditor_OnCommand/NamedCommandLookup), no ReaPack_*, no script registration, no directory creation. Standard libraries are injected as copies so generated code can't poison globals. Each run is wrapped in one Undo block, captures print output (capped), caps reaper API calls, and the preflight rejects large numeric literals that would drive runaway loops. Every execution must be confirmed by the user before it runs (the generated code is shown in a native dialog; disable via ExtState MCAssistant/lua_exec_confirm=0). Security blocks are answered locally to avoid provider hangs. Note: a CPU loop with a computed bound can still freeze REAPER if approved — review the confirmation before running.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Fix laggy / duplicated / dropped text paste in the input box. Ctrl+V used to synchronously spawn PowerShell (Get-Clipboard -Format Image) on every paste to check for a clipboard image, freezing the UI thread for the powershell cold-start. That stall let the held Ctrl+V auto-repeat, so ImGui's native text paste fired twice (and sometimes dropped). Now the clipboard image grab only runs when the clipboard has no text (checked via ImGui_GetClipboardText) — text pastes go straight through ImGui with no process spawn. ui.lua only.

version.author: MC Scripts
version.changelog: Move the ReaPack install path to MC Scripts Release/MediaEye so MC Scripts releases are grouped together.
